AoE attacks that deal Holy damage remove a number of zombies equal to the damage taken. The zombie group has a focus and power of 3 + 1 for every 3 zombies, rounded down. They have an Agility of 2 and Toughness equal to 4. They have access to all basic actions, but otherwise have no special abilities. As a non-heroic entity, they only have access to a single RP. Because they are undead, they are immune to all mind-affecting effects.

A raised undead lasts until the end of the arc or until killed, after which the corpse cannot be raised again in any way.

name: Ranger's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency in light and medium armor, a common ranged weapon group and a common melee weapon group.
benefit2: You gain 5 points in one of the following: Appraise, Athletics, Stealth, Medicine, Perception, Survival, Animal Husbandry or Common Knowledge. You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.
benefit3: You can use Status Assessment.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Status Assessment
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You can assess the approximate HP percentage of a unit until the end of combat. (The DM should enable health bars for the unit). You can also determine which parts of a creature can be targeted and destroyed, if any.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You can assess the approximate HP percentage of a unit until the end of combat. (The DM should enable health bars for the unit). You can also determine which parts of a creature can be targeted and destroyed, if any.

name: Rapid Blasts
benefit1: You may use Ki Blast II.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Ki Blast II
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You may make a Light (1 AP), Precise (2 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) Attack against the target. This attack deals Arcane Damage.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You may make a Light (1 AP), Precise (2 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) Attack against the target. This attack deals Arcane Damage.

name: Receive Oracle
benefit1: You may use Receive Oracle.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Receive Oracle
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You seek divine knowledge on a topic and can ask up to three yes or no questions. You then receive a vision on the answers from an unknown entity. The GM chooses the information you receive. You regain the use of Receive Oracle after a rest.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You seek divine knowledge on a topic and can ask up to three yes or no questions. You then receive a vision on the answers from an unknown entity. The GM chooses the information you receive. You regain the use of Receive Oracle after a rest.

name: Recover Power
benefit1: Any temporary HP on you at the end of an encounter is converted into healing. You regain HP equal to half the value of temporary HP you have remaining.

name: Resheathe
benefit1: You may use Resheathe.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Resheathe
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You regain the Iai state. In addition, your next Iai strike this encounter gains Full Pierce.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You regain the Iai state. In addition, your next Iai strike this encounter gains Full Pierce.

name: Rock and Stone
benefit1: You gain proficiency in 1 armor or in the shield. You also gain proficiency in the Pickaxe specialty weapon.
benefit2: You gain the ability to gather mining outcrops.
benefit3: You gain the ability to create Ingots as an Errand.  See item: Blacksmithing Materials. You may use an IP to do this 4 times instead.

name: Rogue's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency with light armor and with one of the following weapon groups: Small weapons, Light swords, Dueling weapons and Set of missiles.
benefit2: You gain +5 skill points in Roguecraft and +5 skill points to spend in Athletics, Stealth, Deception, Perception, Insight, Negotiation, Intimidation or a relevant Expert Knowledge skill (By DM Approval).  You can exchange any skill point for 2 expertise points, but must spend them in these skills.
benefit3: You can use Feint.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Feint
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You target an enemy. If the target is a Grunt or you have higher Agility than the target, then they cannot make an attack of opportunity against you until the start of your next turn.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You target an enemy. If the target is a Grunt or you have higher Agility than the target, then they cannot make an attack of opportunity against you until the start of your next turn.

name: Rolling Thunder
benefit1: After moving at least 40ft in a turn, your next unarmed strike that turn gains a +2 Transcendent Lightning bonus to accuracy and damage.

name: Saboteur
benefit1: You gain proficiency in Saboteur Thread Daggers.
benefit2: You may use Presence Concealment.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Presence Concealment
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: By suppressing your mana output you conceal your presence, gaining Presence Concealment.  You cannot use any abilites that cost mana or any abilities with the aura keyword while in Presence Concealment.  You can end this effect for 0 RP but the inability to use abilities that cost mana or abilities with the aura keyword persists until the end of your next turn.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: By suppressing your mana output you conceal your presence, gaining Presence Concealment.  You cannot use any abilites that cost mana or any abilities with the aura keyword while in Presence Concealment.  You can end this effect for 0 RP but the inability to use abilities that cost mana or abilities with the aura keyword persists until the end of your next turn.

name: Sanctioned Healer
benefit1: When you attack an enemy with Sanctify, you may choose not to trigger the effect of it.
benefit2: You gain Elemental Mastery: Holy

name: Scholar of Tactics
benefit1: You gain proficiency in Pistols.
benefit2: You may use Take Cover!.

name: Shared Darkness
benefit1: The range of your darkvision increases by 60ft.
benefit2: You may use Darkvision.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Darkvision
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You touch an ally and share your Darkvision with them until the end of the encounter, letting them see up 60ft in the darkness.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You touch an ally and share your Darkvision with them until the end of the encounter, letting them see up 60ft in the darkness.

name: Shield the Fallen
benefit1: You may use Shield the Fallen.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Shield the Fallen
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You give the ally temporary HP equal to the damage they would take from the attack.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You give the ally temporary HP equal to the damage they would take from the attack.
associatedAbilityRef.requirementHtml: Downed ally takes damage from an attack.
associatedAbilityRef.requirementText: Downed ally takes damage from an attack.

name: Shielding Fist
benefit1: While you have at least 1 hand empty and aren't wielding a shield, you gain a +4 Shield bonus to your block.

name: Shrug it off
benefit1: You may use Vital Drive II.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Vital Drive II
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You regain HP equal to five times the mana spent. Vital Drive II cannot heal more than the damage you took from the triggering attack.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You regain HP equal to five times the mana spent. Vital Drive II cannot heal more than the damage you took from the triggering attack.

name: Snipe
benefit1: You gain proficiency in Sniper Rifles.
benefit2: If you did not move this turn or the previous turn you gain a +1d4 Snipe bonus to your accuracy roll on attacks made with a Sniper Rifle.

name: Song without Song
benefit1: You may have 1 additional song active at the same time.
benefit2: You learn the language 'Music'.

name: Sorcerer's Journey
benefit1: You gain proficiency in Channeling Weapons and Light Armor.
benefit2: You gain +5 skill points in Magic.
benefit3: You gain Arcane Mastery. Upon mastering this class, you may master an additional element of your choice.

name: Soul Absorption
benefit1: You gain Elemental Mastery: Dark
benefit2: You may use Soul Absorption.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Soul Absorption
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You make a Light Attack against a willing target that deals Light Dark damage. Your next Dark type Spell or Attack other than Soul Absorption gains extra damage equal to damage taken by the target. (Does not stack)
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You make a Light Attack against a willing target that deals Light Dark damage. Your next Dark type Spell or Attack other than Soul Absorption gains extra damage equal to damage taken by the target. (Does not stack)

name: Soul Bond
benefit1: When you acquire this ability, choose 1 willing person. That person is treated as your Soulmate and several of the class abilities only work on your Soulmate. This cannot be changed unless your Soulmate dies.
benefit2: Your Soulmate is always treated as your VIP for any bodyguard abilities. You may still designate another VIP as normal.

name: Sound the retreat
benefit1: You may use Sound the retreat

associatedAbilityRef.name: Sound the retreat
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You sidestep 4 times your speed, moving as far away from visible enemies as possible. After that, your allies may sidestep up to twice their speed towards you.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You sidestep 4 times your speed, moving as far away from visible enemies as possible. After that, your allies may sidestep up to twice their speed towards you.

name: Spell Challenge
benefit1: When targeting or damaging an enemy with a spell, you may choose to inflict Challenge on them until the end of your next turn.
benefit2: When an enemy that is Challenged by you provokes an attack of opportunity from you, you may instead use Abjurer's Blast against them. The heavy and precise version of this cost 1 RP, while the light version costs 0 RP.

name: Spell Transfer
benefit1: When you use the Create Talisman ability, an ally may spend their Errand action to use one of their spells to put on the talisman instead of your own. You only create 1 copy of this talisman per Errand action and cannot use Secret Art spells with it.

name: Spore Symbiote
benefit1: You can use Spore Symbiote.
benefit2: You gain Earth Elemental Mastery.
benefit3: You can create a cute mushroom cap hat to wear.

name: Status Assessment II
benefit1: You may use Status Assessment II.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Status Assessment II
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You can assess the approximate HP percentage of a unit until the end of combat. (The DM should enable health bars for the unit). You can also assess any damage type weaknesses and strengths that the enemy has at the current time. You can also determine which parts of a creature can be targeted and destroyed, if any.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You can assess the approximate HP percentage of a unit until the end of combat. (The DM should enable health bars for the unit). You can also assess any damage type weaknesses and strengths that the enemy has at the current time. You can also determine which parts of a creature can be targeted and destroyed, if any.

name: Store Time
benefit1: You can use Store Time.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Store Time
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You gain Store Time, granting you 1 extra AP at the start of your next turn.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You gain Store Time, granting you 1 extra AP at the start of your next turn.

name: Studied Healer
benefit1: You gain +5 skill points in the Religion skill.
benefit2: Followers of your Religion are more obligated to listen to you, granting you a +5 Negotiation Bonus when dealing with them.

name: Stygian Comprehension
benefit1: You gain Elemental Mastery: Dark
benefit2: You may use Dark Bolt.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Dark Bolt
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You fire a bolt of darkness at a target, making a Light Attack that deals Dark Damage. You may take true damage equal to your Power + 3 to give this ability Full Pierce.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You fire a bolt of darkness at a target, making a Light Attack that deals Dark Damage. You may take true damage equal to your Power + 3 to give this ability Full Pierce.

name: Summon Animal
benefit1: You may use Summon Animal.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Summon Animal
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml:
You summon a randomly chosen animal to a location you can see within range. The summon does not act by itself, but you may spend AP to make it act. The AP cost for these actions is the same as they would be for you taking the basic actions. (Example, you can spend 2 AP to make the summon do a Heavy attack).

The summon also gains access to the abilities the summoned creature normally has. The costs for these have to be paid by you, same as they would be for basic actions. Any attacks it makes are made with its own stats. When an animal summoned through this ability dies, you cannot use this ability again until the end of the encounter. You can undo the summoning manually for 0 AP.

The pool of creatures that can be summoned is the following: Wolf, Boar, Giant Spider.

name: Summoning Basics
benefit1: You may channel for 10 minutes after which you arrive at the space between worlds, allowing you to interact with Eidolons that wish to meet with you.
benefit2: You may use Attune Eidolon.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Attune Eidolon
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml:
You attune to a specific Eidolon, paying the attunement cost (if applicable) and then activating its Passive (if applicable).  You gain its Channel Eidolon, Summon Lesser Eidolon and Secret Art: Summon Eidolon abilities provided that you have advanced enough in this class to get them.

You may use this as an Encounter Start ability without paying an AP cost.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText:
You attune to a specific Eidolon, paying the attunement cost (if applicable) and then activating its Passive (if applicable).  You gain its Channel Eidolon, Summon Lesser Eidolon and Secret Art: Summon Eidolon abilities provided that you have advanced enough in this class to get them.

You may use this as an Encounter Start ability without paying an AP cost.
associatedAbilityRef.requirementHtml: You have an Eidolon you are contracted to.
associatedAbilityRef.requirementText: You have an Eidolon you are contracted to.

name: Superconductor
benefit1: When you make an attack that deals Lightning damage to a target afflicted with Static, you gain a +1 accuracy bonus.
benefit2: You gain Elemental Mastery: Lightning.

name: Superior Assessment
benefit1: You may use Status Assessment III.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Status Assessment III
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You can assess the approximate HP and RP percentage of a unit until the end of combat. (The DM should enable health bars for the unit). You can also assess any damage type weaknesses and strengths that the enemy has at the current time. You can also determine which parts of a creature can be targeted and destroyed, if any.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You can assess the approximate HP and RP percentage of a unit until the end of combat. (The DM should enable health bars for the unit). You can also assess any damage type weaknesses and strengths that the enemy has at the current time. You can also determine which parts of a creature can be targeted and destroyed, if any.

name: Surgical Precision
benefit1: When you deal damage with a one-handed melee weapon that is both Sure Hit and Full Pierce or a critical hit, you inflict Bleeding on the target for 1 turn. This effect stacks with other Bleeds effects and itself up to 3 times.

name: Take the advantage
benefit1: When attacking a target inflicted with Offstep, Stagger or Blinded, you gain a +1 accuracy bonus against them.

name: Terrifying Charge
benefit1: When dealing damage with the trample effect or with your Secret Art: Override, any non-heroic target you damage becomes Shaken until the end of their next turn.

name: The Alchemist
benefit1: You gain Alchemist Core Crafting Abilities, and proficiency in 1 basic weapon.
benefit2: You can craft using non-advanced materials and base materials. You may use an IP to perform an EP action tied to this key ability 4 times.
benefit3: You can use an Alchemist's Alembic as crafting tool for alchemy crafts.
benefit4: You craft 3 of the same Elixir, Potion, Flask, Poison or Salve when using an interlude point instead of 1. You only need to pay the listed cost once.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Alchemist Core Crafting
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml:
Efficient Dilution
Cost: 10 Crafting Points
Description: 
By diluting the contents to the perfect required amounts, you gain an additional Elixir, Potion, Flask, Poison or Salve upon crafting success.

Stone Grinding
Cost: 10 Crafting Points
Description: 
You extract the highest quality healing materials from herbs, granting Healing +5 to a Potion with a heal or shielding effect.

Pressurization 
Cost: 10 Crafting Points
Description: 
You pressurize a Flask carefully. If the Flask has an area of effect, increases the area by 5ft (example a 10ft radius becomes 15ft radius).

Volatile Flask
Cost: 10 Crafting Points
Description: 
You overload the active ingredients on a Flask, giving it a +5 damage to its damaging effects.

Detoxify Elixir
Cost: 10 Crafting Points
Description: 
You reduce the toxicity of an Elixir while still maintaining its effect, reducing the damage from taking an Elixir by 3.

Create Oil Coating
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create an Oil Coating from Carpenter materials.  See Items:  Carpenter Materials

name: Thefts of the past
benefit1: When making a check with the Roguecraft skill, you may treat the object or person you’re interacting with as being up to an hour in the past. This may allow you to steal things not currently carried, open doors before they were locked and more. Does not work in combat and an item that is consumed cannot be stolen.
benefit2: Using the Delay encounter start action does not consume your encounter start action use and you may use it multiple times.

name: Throwing Rhythm
benefit1: When you make an attack with a throwing weapon, or take the thrown attack basic action, you may move 5ft as if you had the light sword passive (Nimble).

name: Timberwright's Core Crafting
benefit1: You may use the Timberwright's Core Crafting abilities
benefit2: You may craft using Ash and Yew materials.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Timberwright's Core Crafting
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml:
Carpenter's Modification B
Cost: X Crafting Points
Description: 
You add an B-Type modification to the weapon or tool. See the Universal Weapon page as well as the individual weapon page for details. Each modification has its own cost.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText:
Carpenter's Modification B
Cost: X Crafting Points
Description:
You add an B-Type modification to the weapon or tool. See the Universal Weapon page as well as the individual weapon page for details. Each modification has its own cost.

name: Titan's Grip
benefit1: You may wield a Two-Handed weapon in 1 hand allowing you to use a second (Two-Handed) weapon or shield in your offhand.
benefit2: While dual wielding Two-Handed weapons, you may make dual wield attacks as if they were One-Handed weapons.

name: Toss a coin
benefit1: As an Errand action, you may perform in a city or town and earn Clim equal to your relevant Art roll x 10 up to a maximum of 300 clim.

name: Toxic Blast
benefit1: You may use Toxic Blast.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Toxic Blast
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You fire a stream of poison and make a Light attack against the target. On hit, this deals no damage but inflicts the enemy with Toxic, making them take 1d6 full pierce Poison damage at the start of their turn until they spend 2 AP to remove the poison effect.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You fire a stream of poison and make a Light attack against the target. On hit, this deals no damage but inflicts the enemy with Toxic, making them take 1d6 full pierce Poison damage at the start of their turn until they spend 2 AP to remove the poison effect.

name: Tranquil Prayers
benefit1: Your Acolyte, Priest and High Priest Healing abilities heal for 2x value when used out of combat.

name: Transfusion
benefit1: You may use Transfusion.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Transfusion
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml:
You lose HP up to your Toughness x 2. Target ally within range heals for the same amount of HP you lost.

This HP loss cannot be mitigated in any way and ignores temporary HP. This does not trigger effects that would trigger upon taking damage.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText:

This HP loss cannot be mitigated in any way and ignores temporary HP. This does not trigger effects that would trigger upon taking damage.

name: Transmutation Basics
benefit1: You gain Transmuter Core Crafting Abilities. You may use one of these abilities in a crafting session. If you use one of these abilities, other transmuters can no longer use their co craft abilities with you. Similarly, if a co crafter uses one of these abilities for you, you can no longer use any of these abilities.
benefit2: You can craft using non-advanced materials and base materials. You may use an IP to perform an EP action tied to this key ability 4 times.
benefit3: You can now craft Elixirs, Potions, Flasks and Salves. You craft 3 of the same Elixir, Potion, Flask or Salve when using an interlude point instead of 1. You only need to pay the listed cost once.
benefit4: You gain proficiency in alchemist’s tools and 1 basic weapon type.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Transmutation Basics
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml:
Alchemic Catch
Description: 
Co-Craft. Use a hasty transmutation to attempt to fix a crafting error. You may reroll a crafting dice immediately after determining the result. You must keep the second number. Cannot be used for the last crafting dice.

Temperature Shock
Description: 
Co-Craft. Can be used immediately after the result of a roll is determined. The previous action has no effect and instead gain a +10 to your next crafting action.

Rage Quit
Cost: 1 Crafting Dice
Description: 
Co-Craft. Only usable once per crafting IP.  Destroy the uncrafted item and all materials invested into the craft.  You may immediately start another crafting session.  If you use this as a Co-Craft it requires 1 crafting dice from the main crafter.

Bouncing Ideas
Description:
Co-Craft. You assist with crafting adding 1d4 crafting points to the current craft.

Create Ingot
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create an ingot from blacksmithing base materials or from blacksmithing special materials.  See Item:  Blacksmithing Materials.

Create Oil Coating
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create an Oil Coating from Carpenter materials.  See Items:  Carpenter Materials

Create Wood Block
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create a Wood Block from Carpenter materials.  See Items:  Carpenter Materials

Craft Fuel Shells
Cost: Errand
Description: 
You craft up to 5 small shells.  You can instead craft a medium shell instead of 2 small shells.  Small shells require 50 magical fuel, medium shells require 200 magical fuel.

Create Artifice Parts
Cost: Errand
Description:
You create up to 3000u of artifice parts of the same type of blacksmithing material used to make them at a 1:1 rate. (3000u of Iron Creates 3000u of Iron Artifice Parts.)  See Items:  Blacksmithing Materials, Artificer Materials. When converting items of a higher tier, you can convert up to 6000 of tamahagane, 9000 of mithril, 12000 of Orihalcum or 15000 of escudo.

Tan Leather
Cost: Errand
Description: 
You create a tanned hide from armorsmithing base leather materials. See item: Armorsmthing materials.

Create Box or Bundle of Food
Cost: Errand.
Description: 
You create a perfect mix of ingredients that would be worthy of a stock with 500u of matching material.  Example:  500u of Meat can make 1 Box of Fresh Meat.  You can make 5 boxes of any kind for one errand action.

name: Transmutation Tricks
benefit1: For 1 AP, You can create small items using transmuting to provide temporary comforts and curiosities— a cup to drink out of, a chair to sit down on, a figurine etc.  These items cannot have significant gameplay factors (such as a key or a tool).  If you’d like to create something small to give away or sell, you must utilize x amount of commodities of whatever quantity and type the GM decides.
benefit2: You may use your transmuter abilities a second time during a craft or co craft.
benefit3: You may use the following abilities:

associatedAbilityRef.name: Transmuter Tricks
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml:
Stabilize Matter
Description: 
Co-Craft. Use a transmutation that stabilizes the material, making it easier to work with. The next crafting d10 cannot roll lower than a 6.

A Small Bit of Creation
Cost: One herb with a rarity higher than common.
Description:
You deconstruct and reconstruct the structure of an harvested alchemy herb. By lowering its energy level you attune an herb to another element. Choose one herb and lower its rarity by one step and then change its element into the element of your choice.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText:
Stabilize Matter
Description:
Co-Craft. Use a transmutation that stabilizes the material, making it easier to work with. The next crafting d10 cannot roll lower than a 6.

A Small Bit of Creation
Cost: One herb with a rarity higher than common.
Description:
You deconstruct and reconstruct the structure of an harvested alchemy herb. By lowering its energy level you attune an herb to another element. Choose one herb and lower its rarity by one step and then change its element into the element of your choice.

name: Transmuter of Life
benefit1: You may use Biohacking.
benefit2: You can store up to one gene in your gene inventory.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Biohacking
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml:
At the start of an arc, you can transmute a gene from a Chimera Subrace into your DNA as long as you have a sample (a vial of blood).

Transmuting the gene does not consume the item. Add a single Chimera gene to your gene inventory. 

You can perform this action again for an IP or EP. Biohacking can store genes equal to your gene limit.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText:
At the start of an arc, you can transmute a gene from a Chimera Subrace into your DNA as long as you have a sample (a vial of blood).

Transmuting the gene does not consume the item. Add a single Chimera gene to your gene inventory.

You can perform this action again for an IP or EP. Biohacking can store genes equal to your gene limit.

name: Trap Basics
benefit1: You may convert 100u of junk into a Trapper's Trap you can use for your abilities. You may do so as a Rest action or as an Errand action. Trapper's Traps are a special item that cost 1 burden.
benefit2: You may carry up to 3 Trapper's Traps without them costing Burden.
benefit3: When resting at your camp outdoors, you may set traps that will alert you to enemies approaching by using a rest action. These do not consume a Trapper's Trap,  but allow you to use Survival to detect enemies instead of Perception. After each of such rests, you obtain 1d10 x 5 food units.

name: Tremorsense
benefit1: You gain Earth Mastery.
benefit2: You may use Tremorsense

associatedAbilityRef.name: Tremorsense
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml:
You become aware of the presence and exact location of any creature within range that is touching the ground until the end of your turn.

Overcharge: You may spend extra mana to increase the range by an additional 40ft per mana spent.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText:
You become aware of the presence and exact location of any creature within range that is touching the ground until the end of your turn.

Overcharge: You may spend extra mana to increase the range by an additional 40ft per mana spent.

name: Undead Mastery
benefit1: For every 300 spirit core you possess above 2000, you can control 1 extra zombie with your Create Undead.

name: Vampiric Strength
benefit1: Your unarmed attack damage is treated as a One-Handed Weapon in which you are proficient. Your unarmed attacks cannot deal non-lethal damage.
benefit2: You may use the Vampire Bite ability.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Vampire Bite
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml:
You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you drain 1 mana from the target, recovering 1 mana yourself. If the target has no mana remaining, you instead deal an additional Light damage.

This unarmed strike must be made with your fangs, but may be made even with both hands full.

Damage done by this ability also reduces the target’s max HP until the target finishes a rest.

A target reduced to 0 HP by this ability is killed and if the target was a heroic unit, it has a chance (GM’s decision) to turn into a vampire subservient to you.

If the target has any mana remaining and is a willing target, you may choose to not deal damage with this attack.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText:
You may make a Light Attack against the target. On damage, you drain 1 mana from the target, recovering 1 mana yourself. If the target has no mana remaining, you instead deal an additional Light damage.

This unarmed strike must be made with your fangs, but may be made even with both hands full.

Damage done by this ability also reduces the target’s max HP until the target finishes a rest.

A target reduced to 0 HP by this ability is killed and if the target was a heroic unit, it has a chance (GM’s decision) to turn into a vampire subservient to you.

If the target has any mana remaining and is a willing target, you may choose to not deal damage with this attack.

name: Versatile Range
benefit1: You may treat your polearm’s threatened range as 5ft instead of 5-10ft. You must declare this during your turn and it lasts until the start of your next turn.

name: VIP Protection
benefit1: At the start of each arc, choose one person other than yourself as your VIP for that arc. Your VIP is the target for several of your abilities.
benefit2: You may use VIP Protection.
benefit3: If you choose a VIP, you cannot become the target of a VIP protection yourself.

associatedAbilityRef.name: VIP Protection
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml:
You change the target of the attack to you instead of your VIP.

This attack automatically hits you and you may not use the Dodge and Block or similar reactions against it. 

The re-directed attack is treated as having most the requirements met as if it was still targeting the original target, including effects that are conditional such as Full Pierce on a downed target, and you are considered to be in the original target's spot for the purposes of range of the attack you're re-directing. 

GM's may rule some conditional effects are based on you rather than the original target, such as attacks with effects based on race.

Does not work against Attacks of Opportunity and cannot be used against an attack that's already redirected.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText:

The re-directed attack is treated as having most the requirements met as if it was still targeting the original target, including effects that are conditional such as Full Pierce on a downed target, and you are considered to be in the original target's spot for the purposes of range of the attack you're re-directing.

Does not work against Attacks of Opportunity and cannot be used against an attack that's already redirected.
associatedAbilityRef.requirementHtml: Your VIP is within 5ft of you and is the target of an attack that does not target you as well.
associatedAbilityRef.requirementText: Your VIP is within 5ft of you and is the target of an attack that does not target you as well.

name: Wall Ride
benefit1: When you create a wall on your turn using your Geomancer or Geomaster abilities, you may move along the wall as it is created. You can jump off at any point of the wall creation, ending in an empty square next to the wall.

name: Wind Master
benefit1: You gain Wind Mastery.
benefit2: You can use Glide.

associatedAbilityRef.name: Glide
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionHtml: You slow down your falling speed to 15ft per round and you are able to move horizontally as if normally moving. If you hit the ground while Glide is active, you do not take any falling damage and this effect ends.
associatedAbilityRef.descriptionText: You slow down your falling speed to 15ft per round and you are able to move horizontally as if normally moving. If you hit the ground while Glide is active, you do not take any falling damage and this effect ends.

name: Zhen Jiao
benefit1: When you move toward an enemy as part of a Bajiquan ability, your attack deals two  extra points of damage for every 5ft moved.
